nasb.text: The men of Beth-shemesh said, “Who is able to stand before the Lord, this holy God? And to whom shall He go up from us?”

esv.text: Then the men of Beth-shemesh said, “Who is able to stand before the Lord, this holy God? And to whom shall he go up away from us?”

cnv.text: 伯．示麥人說：“在耶和華這位聖潔的　神面前，誰能站立得住呢？他可以從我們這裡上到哪裡去呢？”

ccb.text: 伯·示麦人说：“谁能站立在耶和华——这位圣洁的上帝面前呢？该把约柜送到谁那里呢？”
